title: The paddle I play — 11SIX24 Vapor Power 2
dek: Gen 4 full-foam floating core, carbon fiber face, 2,335 RPM spin — 4th highest across 440+ paddles tested. $209 vs $289+ for comparable builds. My daily driver.
body: Image on this block is an editorial study — not a product photo. Hit the external link for the real thing + specs.
